subject: A vast army charges across an open plain toward a raised stone citadel platform, atop which stands a winged, horned figure flanked by attendants, with lightning tearing the night sky
description: A sweeping battle scene at night: a massive crowd of armored fighters surges forward across a flat stone plaza toward a raised tiered platform. Two prominent figures occupy the foreground right — one holding a glowing blue orb. Atop the distant platform, a winged figure with two large curved horns and outstretched wings stands in a commanding pose, flanked by smaller attendant figures on either side. Tall dark obelisks frame the scene at the edges. Lightning bolts in shades of violet and electric blue streak across the stormy upper sky, illuminating roiling clouds. The atmosphere is purple-violet with a central orb of pale light above the platform. The overall composition drives the eye from the surging crowd below toward the commanding figure above, capturing the feeling of a climactic assault against an entrenched power.
foreground: Dense crowd of armored warriors charging forward; two prominent figures in dark armor at right, one with a glowing blue orb
background: Raised stone citadel platform with tiered steps; winged horned figure atop it; dark obelisks at edges; lightning-torn violet-purple sky
emotion: Mass urgency and desperate forward momentum below; cold dominance from the commanding figure above
